run_summary.summary: 10 emails scanned. One new piece of info: Ian Saunders (Popfly) replied at 2:58 PM to Kenny's schedule update — asked which Steinhafels location they plan to visit, and flagged that the May 12 Video 3 timeline is 'a little farther out than we were hoping,' asking whether it can be turned around sooner. Updated Flexsteel next_action accordingly. All other deals carried forward from today's earlier run: Aqara moved to Delivered (reel confirmed live), xTool gifted deal pending decision, HelloFresh still stalled, Dreo window closing Apr 30, JLab payment due Apr 20, Ollie's filming prep needed.

suggestions.message: Ian (ian@popfly.com) asked two things in his 2:58 PM reply: (1) which Steinhafels location you're planning to visit, and (2) whether Video 3 can be filmed before May 12 — he said that timing is later than hoped. Quick reply needed today or tomorrow.
Reel is confirmed live as of Apr 16! Liz shared the link with Mariah (socialmediacollabs.com). Send the $1,500 invoice to Mariah TODAY — don't let this sit.

Posting window closes April 30 and Yaki (yakiii@vanzomedia.com) hasn't responded since Liz's Apr 14 follow-up. Liz quoted $3K on Apr 1. Today is Apr 16 — if no response by Friday Apr 18, this deal is likely dead. One more nudge or walk away.
March campaign payment ($2,000) is due 4/20/26 — 4 days away. No payment received as of Apr 13. Worth a quick check-in with your JLab contact today.

Laura confirmed the P3 laser ($10K product value) is gifted/in-kind only — no cash budget right now. She's asking for Liz's content vision before locking anything in. Decision: accept the gifted deal, counter for a paid add-on, or pass? If yes, reply to gengchunhong@xtool.com with your content ideas.
Ollie's sent the Permission to Film Slip — download it and bring a printed copy to the store before filming. Check the restricted store locations list too. Don't show up without the slip!
Liz rescheduled the Hawke Media sync from Tuesday Apr 21 to Wednesday Apr 22 at 10am PST (confirmed with Alisa Gofman). Alisa is Liz's new paid social contact at agofman@hawkemedia.com.

deals.next_action: Reply to Ian (ian@popfly.com) with which Steinhafels location you're visiting; address whether Video 3 can be filmed before May 12 — he flagged May 12 is later than preferred
deals.notes:
[Apr 16 2:58 PM]: Ian (Popfly) replied to Kenny's schedule — asked WHICH Steinhafels location, and said May 12 for Video 3 is 'a little farther out than we were hoping' — wants to know if it can be moved sooner.
[Apr 16]: Kenny replied to Ian confirming filming schedule — Video 1 filming Tue Apr 21, draft to Popfly by ~Apr 25; Steinhafels visit Apr 23 for Video 2; Video 2 draft ~Apr 28; Video 3 after parents return from FL (~May 12, film that following week). Posts go live 1 week apart. Invoice submitted via Popfly at project completion.
deals.activity_note: Apr 16 (afternoon): Ian asked which Steinhafels location + concerned Video 3 May 12 timeline is later than preferred — response needed

deals.next_action: Send $1,500 invoice to Mariah at socialmediacollabs.com — Reel is confirmed live

[Apr 16]: Liz replied to Mariah confirming Reel is live — shared Instagram link (instagram.com/reel/DXDLWFnjWeI). Invoice for $1,500 now due (1 Reel + TikTok crosspost, 5-year organic usage rights).
[Apr 16]: Mariah (socialmediacollabs.com) asked 'Did this go live by chance?' — Liz had planned to post 'this weekend' (Apr 11-12) after brand approved edits on Apr 9. Brand wants to be tagged as collaborator.

deals.next_action: Decide whether to accept xTool gifted collab (P3 laser, $10K value) or push for paid component — if yes, reply to Laura with content vision
deals.notes:
[Apr 16]: Laura replied — P3 laser ($10K value) offered as gifted/in-kind only. No cash budget. She wants Liz's content vision first: 'We'd like to start from your vision and then build the collaboration together.' Liz had asked about paid options and deliverables.
[Apr 16]: Liz replied to Laura asking about paid collab budget, deliverables, and goals — cc'd Kenny.
deals.activity_note: Apr 16: xTool (Laura) replied — gifted/in-kind only, $10K P3 laser. No cash. Waiting on our decision.
